instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that renders a price list table from `lineItems`, each map having `description` and `amount`. Escape descriptions and format amounts as currency. Show a table footnote row with `grandTotal`.
code:
<#-- Model: lineItems: sequence of { description, amount }, grandTotal: number --> <#list lineItems![] as item>
ItemAmount
${item.description?html} ${item.amount?string.currency}
Total ${(grandTotal!0)?string.currency}
